text.title: Versioned Agent-Memory Files (decisions / patterns / mistakes) Failure Modes
text.summary: ≥3 antipatterns observed in the wild. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: patterns.md grows to 5 MB and the agent context overflows.
antipattern.root-cause: No pruning rule; every minor pattern got appended.
antipattern.fix: Quarterly prune; archive old patterns to .aidocs/memory/archive/.

antipattern.symptom: mistakes.md captured an API key from a debug session; committed.
antipattern.root-cause: No secret-scan hook on memory files.
antipattern.fix: Add gitleaks / trufflehog pre-commit hook covering memory dir.

antipattern.symptom: session.md still says 'finishing F-040' months after F-040 closed.
antipattern.root-cause: No session-close ritual updating the file.
antipattern.fix: End-of-session hook prompts the agent to update session.md.
